name: encoding
summary: sets the encoding of input file. This allows the use of non-ASCII characters in input files.

arguments.raw: <encoding-name> = to see a list of all the supported encoding names, run Therion with --print-encodings option. "UTF-8" (Unicode) and "ASCII" (7 bit) encodings are always supported.
arguments.name: <encoding-name>
arguments.description: to see a list of all the supported encoding names, run Therion with --print-encodings option. "UTF-8" (Unicode) and "ASCII" (7 bit) encodings are always supported.
